_comment: This project ships from Cloudflare Pages, NOT Vercel. The vercel.json is here so any leftover Vercel GitHub integration on a fork sees `ignoreCommand: exit 0` (== skip this deploy) instead of failing. To remove Vercel entirely, disconnect the project at https://vercel.com/dashboard → project → Settings → Git → Disconnect.
buildCommand: echo 'Skipping Vercel build — this site deploys from Cloudflare Pages.' && mkdir -p public && echo '<!doctype html><meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=https://ai.clex.in">' > public/index.html
